info.name: Atlassian rest/api/3/screens/
info.description:
Needs description.

Contact Support:
 Email: ecosystem@atlassian.com

item.name: Atlassian Add Field To Default Screen

request.description:
Adds a field to the default tab of the default screen.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** *Administer Jira* [global permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/x4dKLg).

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.
Returned if the request is invalid.
Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.
Returned if the user does not have the necessary permission.
Returned if the field it not found or the field is already present.

query.description: The list of screen IDs. To include multiple screen IDs, provide an ampersand-separated list. For example, `screenId=10000&screenId=10001`.
The list of screen IDs. To include multiple screen IDs, provide an ampersand-separated list. For example, `screenId=10000&screenId=10001`.
The list of tab IDs. To include multiple tab IDs, provide an ampersand-separated list. For example, `tabId=10000&tabId=10001`.
The list of tab IDs. To include multiple tab IDs, provide an ampersand-separated list. For example, `tabId=10000&tabId=10001`.
The index of the first item to return in a page of results (page offset).
The maximum number of items to return per page. The maximum number is 100,

request.description:
Returns the list of tabs for a bulk of screens.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:**

* *Administer Jira* [global permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/x4dKLg).

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.

query.description: The list of screen IDs. To include multiple screen IDs, provide an ampersand-separated list. For example, `screenId=10000&screenId=10001`.
The list of tab IDs. To include multiple tab IDs, provide an ampersand-separated list. For example, `tabId=10000&tabId=10001`.
The index of the first item to return in a page of results (page offset).
The maximum number of items to return per page. The maximum number is 100,

response.name: Returned if the screen ID or the tab ID is empty.

query.description: The list of screen IDs. To include multiple screen IDs, provide an ampersand-separated list. For example, `screenId=10000&screenId=10001`.
The list of tab IDs. To include multiple tab IDs, provide an ampersand-separated list. For example, `tabId=10000&tabId=10001`.
The index of the first item to return in a page of results (page offset).
The maximum number of items to return per page. The maximum number is 100,

response.name: Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.

query.description: The list of screen IDs. To include multiple screen IDs, provide an ampersand-separated list. For example, `screenId=10000&screenId=10001`.
The list of tab IDs. To include multiple tab IDs, provide an ampersand-separated list. For example, `tabId=10000&tabId=10001`.
The index of the first item to return in a page of results (page offset).
The maximum number of items to return per page. The maximum number is 100,

response.name: Returned if the user does not have the necessary permission.

query.description: The list of screen IDs. To include multiple screen IDs, provide an ampersand-separated list. For example, `screenId=10000&screenId=10001`.
The list of tab IDs. To include multiple tab IDs, provide an ampersand-separated list. For example, `tabId=10000&tabId=10001`.
The index of the first item to return in a page of results (page offset).
The maximum number of items to return per page. The maximum number is 100,

request.description:
Returns the fields that can be added to a tab on a screen.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** *Administer Jira* [global permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/x4dKLg).

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.
Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.
Returned if the user does not have the necessary permission.
Returned if the screen is not found.

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the screen tab.

request.description:
Moves a screen tab field.

If `after` and `position` are provided in the request, `position` is ignored.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** *Administer Jira* [global permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/x4dKLg).

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.
Returned if the request is invalid.
Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.
Returned if the user does not have the necessary permission.
Returned if the screen, screen tab, or field is not found or the field can't be moved to the requested position.

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the screen tab.

request.description:
Removes a field from a screen tab.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** *Administer Jira* [global permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/x4dKLg).

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.
Returned if the request is invalid.
Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.
Returned if the user does not have the necessary permission.
Returned if the screen, screen tab, or field is not found.

item.name: Atlassian Get All Screen Tab Fields

query.description: The key of the project.

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the screen tab.

request.description:
Returns all fields for a screen tab.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:**

* *Administer Jira* [global permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/x4dKLg).
* *Administer projects* [project permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/yodKLg) when the project key is specified, providing that the screen is associated with the project through a Screen Scheme and Issue Type Screen Scheme.

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.

query.description: The key of the project.

response.name: Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.

query.description: The key of the project.

response.name: Returned if the user does not have the necessary permission.

query.description: The key of the project.

response.name: Returned if the screen or screen tab is not found.

query.description: The key of the project.

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the screen tab.

request.description:
Adds a field to a screen tab.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** *Administer Jira* [global permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/x4dKLg).

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.
Returned if the request is invalid.
Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.
Returned if the user does not have the necessary permission.
Returned if the screen, screen tab, or field is not found.

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the screen tab.
(Required) The position of tab. The base index is 0.

request.description:
Moves a screen tab.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** *Administer Jira* [global permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/x4dKLg).

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.
Returned if the request is invalid.
Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.
Returned if the user does not have the necessary permission.
Returned if the screen or screen tab is not found or the position is invalid.

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the screen tab.

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.

Returned if the screen or screen tab is not found.

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.

request.description:
Returns the list of tabs for a screen.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:**

* *Administer Jira* [global permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/x4dKLg).
* *Administer projects* [project permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/yodKLg) when the project key is specified, providing that the screen is associated with the project through a Screen Scheme and Issue Type Screen Scheme.

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.

response.name: Returned if the screen ID is invalid.

request.description:
Creates a tab for a screen.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** *Administer Jira* [global permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/x4dKLg).

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.
Returned if the request is invalid.
Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.
Returned if the user does not have the necessary permission.
Returned if the screen is not found.

request.description:
Deletes a screen. A screen cannot be deleted if it is used in a screen scheme, workflow, or workflow draft.

Only screens used in classic projects can be deleted.

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.
Returned if the request is not valid.
Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.
Returned if the user does not have the necessary permission.
Returned if the screen is not found.

request.description:
Updates a screen. Only screens used in classic projects can be updated.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** *Administer Jira* [global permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/x4dKLg).

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.
Returned if the request is not valid.
Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.
Returned if the user does not have the necessary permission.
Returned if the screen is not found.
